'''鈭歯g-l-k''' ('''kangalak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exodust|exodust]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exodust|exodust]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-l-k
|-
! Lemma
| kangalak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingalak|thingalak]] || [[word:jingalak|jingalak]] || [[word:shingalak|shingalak]] || [[word:kingalak|kingalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungalak|thuthungalak]] || [[word:jujungalak|jujungalak]] || [[word:shushungalak|shushungalak]] || [[word:kukungalak|kukungalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungalak|thungalak]] || [[word:jungalak|jungalak]] || [[word:shungalak|shungalak]] || [[word:kungalak|kungalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungalak|thungalak]] || [[word:jungalak|jungalak]] || [[word:shungalak|shungalak]] || [[word:kungalak|kungalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengalak|thengalak]] || [[word:jengalak|jengalak]] || [[word:shengalak|shengalak]] || [[word:kengalak|kengalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongalak|thothongalak]] || [[word:jojongalak|jojongalak]] || [[word:shoshongalak|shoshongalak]] || [[word:kokongalak|kokongalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongalak|thongalak]] || [[word:jongalak|jongalak]] || [[word:shongalak|shongalak]] || [[word:kongalak|kongalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongalak|thongalak]] || [[word:jongalak|jongalak]] || [[word:shongalak|shongalak]] || [[word:kongalak|kongalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngalak|th忙ngalak]] || [[word:j忙ngalak|j忙ngalak]] || [[word:sh忙ngalak|sh忙ngalak]] || [[word:k忙ngalak|k忙ngalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangalak|thathangalak]] || [[word:jajangalak|jajangalak]] || [[word:shashangalak|shashangalak]] || [[word:kakangalak|kakangalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangalak|thangalak]] || [[word:jangalak|jangalak]] || [[word:shangalak|shangalak]] || [[word:kangalak|kangalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangalak|thangalak]] || [[word:jangalak|jangalak]] || [[word:shangalak|shangalak]] || [[word:kangalak|kangalak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangalak|shangalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangalak|goshangalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangalak|gokishangalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangalakn眉|shangalakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangalaknkn眉|goshangalaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangalakn眉|gokishangalakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangalaksh毛|shangalaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangalaknksh毛|goshangalaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangalaksh毛|gokishangalaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangalakro|shangalakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangalaknkro|goshangalaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangalakro|gokishangalakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangalakmu|shangalakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangalaknkmu|goshangalaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangalakmu|gokishangalakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangalaksher|shangalaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangalaknksher|goshangalaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangalaksher|gokishangalaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangalakng|shangalakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangalaknkng|goshangalaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangalakng|gokishangalakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangalakya|shangalakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangalaknkya|goshangalaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangalakya|gokishangalakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangalakyam|shangalakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangalaknkyam|goshangalaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangalakyam|gokishangalakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangalakn眉sh毛|shangalakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangalaknkn眉sh毛|goshangalaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangalakn眉sh毛|gokishangalakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangalakn眉ro|shangalakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangalaknkn眉ro|goshangalaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangalakn眉ro|gokishangalakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangalakn眉mu|shangalakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangalaknkn眉mu|goshangalaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangalakn眉mu|gokishangalakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangalaksh毛n眉|shangalaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangalaknksh毛n眉|goshangalaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangalaksh毛n眉|gokishangalaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangalaksh毛ro|shangalaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangalaknksh毛ro|goshangalaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangalaksh毛ro|gokishangalaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangalaksh毛mu|shangalaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangalaknksh毛mu|goshangalaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangalaksh毛mu|gokishangalaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangalakron眉|shangalakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangalaknkron眉|goshangalaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangalakron眉|gokishangalakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangalakrosh毛|shangalakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangalaknkrosh毛|goshangalaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangalakrosh毛|gokishangalakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangalakromu|shangalakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangalaknkromu|goshangalaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangalakromu|gokishangalakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangalakmun眉|shangalakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangalaknkmun眉|goshangalaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangalakmun眉|gokishangalakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangalakmush毛|shangalakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangalaknkmush毛|goshangalaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangalakmush毛|gokishangalakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangalakmuro|shangalakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangalaknkmuro|goshangalaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangalakmuro|gokishangalakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
